top3.sql:
SELECT b.budget_id, b.amount
FROM budget b
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%water%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%chips%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%cookies%'
GROUP BY b.budget_id, b.amount
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT budget_id
FROM budget
WHERE category IN ('water', 'chips', 'cookies')
GROUP BY budget_id
ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT b.budget_id, b.amount
FROM budget b
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%water%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%chips%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%cookies%'
GROUP BY b.budget_id, b.amount
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT budget_id
FROM budget
WHERE category IN ('water', 'chips', 'cookies')
GROUP BY budget_id
ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT b.budget_id, b.amount
FROM budget b
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%water%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%chips%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%cookies%'
GROUP BY b.budget_id, b.amount
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT b.budget_id, b.amount
FROM budget b
WHERE b.budget_id IN (
    SELECT e.link_to_budget
    FROM expense e
    WHERE LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%water%' 
       OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%chips%' 
       OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%cookies%'
)
ORDER BY b.amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT budget_id
FROM budget
WHERE category IN ('water', 'chips', 'cookies')
GROUP BY budget_id
HAVING SUM(amount) = (
    SELECT MAX(total_amount)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_amount
        FROM budget
        WHERE category IN ('water', 'chips', 'cookies')
        GROUP BY budget_id
    )
);

final.sql:
SELECT b.budget_id, b.amount
FROM budget b
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%water%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%chips%' 
   OR LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%cookies%'
GROUP BY b.budget_id, b.amount
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 1;
